greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to AMK Beauty in Bath — ask me about our treatments, prices, hours, or booking.
persona: You are a warm, welcoming assistant for AMK Beauty, a beauty salon in Bath offering brows, lashes, nails, massage, and aesthetics. Keep answers friendly, concise, and in 1-3 sentences.

faq.answer: We're open Mon-Wed 9:30am-3pm, Thu 9:30am-6:30pm, Fri 9:30am-7pm, and Sat 9am-4pm. We're closed on Sundays.

Prices vary by treatment — for example, threading/waxing starts at £12, a Lift and Tint is £40, and a BIAB manicure starts from £32. Let me know which treatment you're after and I can share more details.

We offer brows, lashes, nails, pedicures, hair removal, massage, aesthetics, and makeup. Our Aesthetics and Makeup services are run by specialists who work select days — check their Instagram pages for pricing and booking.
You can reach AMK Beauty on 01225 732 404 or by emailing amkbeauty.bath@outlook.com.
We're located at 87 High Street, Bath, BA2 1DE, with plenty of on-street parking and a bus stop right outside.

We highly recommend booking an appointment in advance, as our therapists work different days and may not be available for walk-ins. Just let me know a day and time that suits you and I'll check availability.
Yes, a patch test is mandatory for Lash Lift, Lash Extensions, Brow Tint, and Brow Lamination. It must be done at least 48 hours before your appointment and stays valid for six months.
Cancelling less than 24 hours before your appointment incurs a 50% fee, and no-shows are charged the full service price. Card details are required at booking due to this policy.
We accept both cash and card payments at your appointment, though card details are required when booking due to our cancellation policy.
Of course — please share your name and contact details and our team will get back to you, or you can call us directly on 01225 732 404.
